title: lolium × holmbergii
intro: Lolium × holmbergii, also known as Holmberg's ryegrass, is a hybrid species of ryegrass that is a cross between Lolium perenne and Lolium multiflorum. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Lolium × holmbergii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Lolium × holmbergii can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
